title: fix: correct gptimage-large text input pricing
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Cheaper words for big pictures
gist.blurb: We noticed text prompts for gptimage-large were accidentally wearing the premium image price tag. We've swapped it out, so your words are now cheaper to process.
gist.summary: Fixed a billing configuration where text inputs to the gptimage-large model were incorrectly charged at the higher image input rate.
gist.impact: Developers using gptimage-large will see reduced costs for their text prompts and cached text inputs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee swapping a price tag on a glowing text block, with the Nomnom creature happily eating the old expensive price tag.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot swapping a price tag on a glowing block of text, while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the old expensive price tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot swapping a price tag on a glowing block of text, while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the old expensive price tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
